captions.text: drag to move, drag the edge to retime
clips snap so the beats line up

lines.text: Hit play, and every scene runs on one global timeline.
Below the stage, each clip is something you can grab.
Drag a clip to move it, drag its edge to retime it.
Everything snaps to the playhead and its neighbours, so the beats line up.
Every edit writes straight back into the scene's JSON.
